name: nightward
title: Nightward
description: Review local AI agent state, findings, and redacted fix plans from Raycast.
author: jsonbored

preferences.name: nightwardPath
preferences.title: Nightward Command
preferences.description: Path or command name used to run Nightward locally.

preferences.name: homeOverride
preferences.title: Home Override
preferences.description: Optional HOME-equivalent directory passed as NIGHTWARD_HOME for testing.

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Nightward Dashboard
commands.description: Show local scan counts, schedule status, adapters, and top findings.

commands.name: findings
commands.title: Nightward Findings
commands.description: Browse redacted Nightward findings with severity filters and fix guidance.

commands.name: analysis
commands.title: Nightward Analysis
commands.description: Browse offline analysis signals and provider status.

commands.name: provider-doctor
commands.title: Nightward Provider Doctor
commands.description: Check optional local and online-capable analysis providers.

commands.name: explain-finding
commands.title: Explain Nightward Finding
commands.description: Open a detailed explanation for one Nightward finding ID.

commands.name: explain-signal
commands.title: Explain Nightward Signal
commands.description: Open the analysis signal for a Nightward finding ID.

commands.name: export-fix-plan
commands.title: Export Nightward Fix Plan
commands.description: Copy the redacted Nightward fix plan markdown to the clipboard.

commands.name: export-analysis
commands.title: Export Nightward Analysis
commands.description: Copy the redacted offline analysis report markdown to the clipboard.

commands.name: open-report-folder
commands.title: Open Nightward Reports
commands.description: Open the local Nightward scheduled report folder in Finder.

scripts.test:junit: mkdir -p ../../reports/junit && node --import tsx --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=../../reports/junit/raycast.raw.xml test/*.test.ts && node scripts/normalize-junit.mjs ../../reports/junit/raycast.raw.xml ../../reports/junit/raycast.xml
